title: Invert Binary Tree
description:
Given the root of a binary tree, invert the tree, and return its root.

Inverting a binary tree means swapping the left and right children of every node.

Input is given as a level-order traversal with -1 representing null nodes. Output the level-order traversal of the inverted tree (excluding trailing nulls).

examples.explanation: The inverted tree swaps left and right children at every level.

author: chron303
